free_text: Emission of Li, 7,9Be and B fragments in the
interaction of 12C with 93Nb between 200 and 400 MeV
Target of 93Nb with thickness of 1.72 mg/cm2 was used.
consisting of a transmission Si dE detector and a
NaI(Tl) stopping detector. The Si detectors had
thicknesses of nominally 25 and 150 mu-m, respectvely,
while 127 mm thick NaI detectors were used on both
